title: Shared Sources, Tenant Subscriptions, State Machines, and Races
description: Equivalent URLs create duplicate pollers, unfollow removes shared entries, source state is a boolean, IDs imply authorization, and check-then-insert races remain. Learners cumulatively produce idempotent shared-source subscription service through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Register an approved discovered source idempotently from identity, provenance, parser evidence, and current policy.
Create and remove tenant-scoped follows without deleting shared source history and expose explicit desired-state semantics.
Model pending, active, paused, moved, failing, disabled, deleted, and appealed transitions with actors and causes.
